name: Community Choice Credit Union
description_short: Community Choice Credit Union is a Michigan-based federally insured credit union offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and digital banking services with 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs nationwide.
description_long:
Community Choice Credit Union is a federally insured credit union operating across Michigan with multiple member centers. The organization has been actively serving cannabis businesses since 2020 and emphasizes community involvement, recording 13,359 volunteer service hours in 2025. Their leadership, including President and CEO Rob Bava, has received recognition from the Michigan Credit Union League and Mastercard for community service initiatives.

The credit union offers comprehensive financial products including checking and savings accounts, personal loans, auto loans, mortgages, and business lending solutions. Members have access to 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs nationwide, express pay functionality, and digital banking tools. Their e-Banking platform includes a "Targets" savings feature that allows members to organize savings by specific goals with visual progress tracking. They also offer "Choice Map," a financial wellness planning tool that connects members with Personal Advisors for customized financial guidance.

Community Choice differentiates itself through emphasis on personalized service combined with digital convenience, positioning itself as bridging the gap between large banking institutions and neighborhood credit unions. The company highlights low fees, convenient digital access available 24/7, and community-focused values. They actively market to underserved business segments, including cannabis enterprises, and have received Mastercard recognition for their "Doing Well by Doing Good" approach to community impact.

The company maintains strong member satisfaction ratings (4.8 stars on Google for overall service, 4.6 stars for mobile app). However, as a regional credit union, they may have more limited product variety than national banks, and membership eligibility may be restricted by geographic or affinity requirements typical of credit unions. Specific loan terms, interest rates, and fee structures are not detailed on the main website content provided.

As a financial institution, this bank competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find flexible terms through online lenders, while debt consolidation loans offer fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Checking Account
features: No monthly maintenance fee (with qualifying deposit)

pros: Access to 30,000+ surcharge-free ATMs nationwide despite being a Michigan-based credit union
Targets savings feature allows goal-based savings organization with visual progress tracking in e-Banking
4.8-star Google rating and 4.6-star mobile app rating demonstrate strong member satisfaction
Choice Map financial wellness planning tool with access to Personal Advisors for customized guidance
Explicit willingness to serve cannabis businesses since 2020, addressing underserved market segment
Federally insured credit union with multiple member centers across Michigan
24/7 digital banking access with skip-a-payment option available in e-Banking
cons: Geographic membership restrictions likely apply as a credit union (membership eligibility not fully detailed)
Limited product detail on website—specific APR ranges, fee schedules, and loan terms not disclosed
Regional footprint (Michigan-focused) may mean fewer physical locations than national banks for out-of-state members
Mobile app and e-Banking features prominent in marketing but core loan and savings product details sparse
No information on minimum account balances, deposit requirements, or membership eligibility criteria visible
best_for: Michigan residents seeking a community-focused credit union with nationwide ATM access and low fees
Small business owners in the cannabis industry looking for specialized lending and banking support
Members who value goal-based savings tools and personalized financial advisory services
Consumers prioritizing 24/7 digital banking convenience combined with local relationship banking
diagnosis: Community Choice Credit Union is best for Michigan-area members and underserved business segments (particularly cannabis enterprises) seeking a credit union that combines digital convenience with personalized service and community values. The main caveat is typical credit union membership restrictions and lack of transparent rate/fee disclosure on their primary website, requiring direct inquiry for specific product terms.
services: Savings accounts with Targets goal-based savings organization tool
Auto loans with online document process
Mortgages for home purchase and refinance
Business loans and real estate financing for small businesses
e-Banking platform with 24/7 access and skip-a-payment functionality
Mobile banking app for iPhone and Android
Choice Map financial wellness planning and advisory services
Business e-Banking enrollment and Trust account services
